SKILL.md uses description-only framing patterns documented in Saha et al. (arXiv:2605.11418) §6 — claims of being 'best', 'always use', 'trusted by', 'source of truth' etc. — that bias an agent's selection in 77.6% of pairwise trials even when the underlying capability is unchanged. Strong manipulation surface for supply-chain attackers.
